fault_hypothesis: The mean calculation on line 74 incorrectly divides by the original `window` size instead of the number of samples actually used (`len(recent)`). When the number of values is less than the window size, this results in an erroneously small average.

constraints.intent: The calculated mean, when multiplied by the number of samples, should equal the total sum of those samples.

spec.expr: (window <= len(values) and effective_window__1 == window) or (window > len(values) and effective_window__1 == len(values))

constraints.intent: The effective window size should be the smaller of the requested window and the number of available values.
The number of recent samples must match the calculated effective window size.
